title: iria thonningiana
intro: Iria thonningiana, also known as African Gentian, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial activities. The health benefits of Iria thonningiana include its potential to treat fever, malaria, and other diseases, as well as its antioxidant properties that may help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In herbal preparations, Iria thonningiana can be found in various forms, such as extracts, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or other medicinal products.
